data.content: Implementation review approved. The fix replaces the fixed-width flex layout (w-[140px]/w-[220px]) with a CSS grid using max-content column sizing, so multi-pill agent labels size from rendered content and no longer overlap the weight input. Mobile layout correctly spans the label across all columns. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc clean, 200/200 test files (2314 tests passed). Layout contract test locks in the grid structure and absence of fixed-width classes.
